title: Panasonic NF-GM600KXC 6-in-1 Electric Multi Cooker, 1400W, 40-250°C, 9 Auto Modes, 6 Plate Accessories, Smoke Extractor, Dishwasher Safe, 2.5m Cord, Black
features: ALL-IN-ONE COOKER: Create everything from kebabs to teppanyaki and burgers with this versatile multi cooker, combining multiple functions in one space-saving kitchen appliance

6 INTEGRATED PLATES: Swap between 6 plate accessories on this multifunction cooker, including grill, flat, pancake, party snack, steam, and deep pot, letting you barbecue, fry, slow cook, or steam a variety of dishes
9 AUTO PROGRAMMES: Simplify meal prep with this electric slow cooker's 9 preset modes: BBQ, Steak, Steam, Slow Cook, Veggies, Party Snack, Pancakes, Preheat, and Keep Warm
MANUAL MODE: Personalise your cooking with this electric cooker's adjustable temperature settings and manual timer (5 mins-12 hours), ideal for slow-cooked meals
SMOKE EXTRACTOR BBQ: Enjoy indoor grilling all year with the smoke extractor technology that eliminates the hassle of smoke and odours
EASY CLEAN: Save time after meals with dishwasher-safe cooking trays and accessories in this steam cooker, for quick and stress-free cleaning
LONG POWER CORD: Use this home cooking appliance wherever you like thanks to the long 2.5m power cable, ideal for balconies, dining tables, or moving it around the kitchen
KITCHEN+ APP: Enjoy over 100 recipes and step-by-step cooking guidance with the Panasonic Kitchen+ app, or by accessing the recipes online. Search 'Panasonic Kitchen+ app' to find out more
description: From the manufacturer Enjoy World Cuisine Together 6-in-1 Table-top Multi-Cooker NF-GM600 The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products. The video shows the product being unpacked. Video Player is loading. Click to play video Play Mute Current Time  0:00 / Duration  0:48 Loaded : 12.51% 0:00 Stream Type  LIVE Seek to live, currently behind live LIVE Remaining Time  - 0:48   1x Playback Rate Chapters Chapters Descriptions descriptions off , selected Captions captions off , selected English (Automated) Audio Track default , selected Fullscreen This is a modal window. Panasonic Product Video Merchant video a culinary journey around the world Be inspired by a range of different cooking plates and the convenient features 6 easy-switch cooking plates Free app for 100+ European to Asian food recipes, Smoke Extractor for enjoyable cooking and dining 9 auto programmes, with manual operation, High temperature range of 40°C to 250°C Easy dishwasher-safe cleaning, Convenient Keep Warm function Stackable, easy-to-store design, BPA- and PFAS-free plates and pot 6-in-1 for Endless Culinary Possibilities Enjoy a variety of dishes together with your family or friends. Perfect for gatherings, the 6-in-1 Multi-Cooker is equipped with six cooking plates. So you can barbecue, steam, stew, Teppanyaki stir-fry and more with just one tabletop cooker. Indoor Grilling Even at the Dining Table Dishwasher-safe Plates and Pot All the cooking plates and the pot are dishwasher-safe. This allows you to enjoy a hassle-free cooking experience with a quick, stress-free clean-up. Effective Smoke Extraction The smoke extractor captures greasy or smelly smoke, it then guides the smoke to the water tank, where it is absorbed by the water. Free Panasonic Kitchen+ App This free app gives you instant access to 100+ recipes, along with step-by-step guidance on how to get the most out of your cooking. Flexible Indoor/Outdoor Dining Cooking and dining at the table, outdoor barbecueing – the International Multi-Cooker with its 2.5m cable is perfect for every occasion.
